summary: Completed comprehensive testing of income payments seeding feature. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly with Partnership page showing 5 tabs and correct income data.

52 income entries in partnership collection - PASSED
seed_data_creation: 52 income payment records seeded from Tracker.xlsx into orders.payments array and partnership collection (type='income')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 52 incoming payment records from Tracker.xlsx have been successfully seeded. Orders collection has real payment data with dates, amounts, modes (UPI/CASH), and notes. Partnership collection has 70 expense entries + 52 income entries. The Partnership page has 5 tabs: Chandana, Akanksha, Kshana (Out), Kshana (UPI), Cash. Kshana Account shows UPI Income ₹1,47,110, Cash Income ₹29,150, SBI Outgoing ₹99,122. Export Center on Dashboard has 'Incoming Payments' export that exports customer payments with order ID, date, amount, mode.
